title: Commerce Price Monitor
description: Find public product pages, extract product details, and detect price or availability changes.

start_urls.title: Store or category URLs
start_urls.description: Store home pages, collection pages, category pages, or direct product URLs.

max_products.title: Max products
max_products.description: Hard limit for product records saved.

max_depth.title: Max crawl depth
max_depth.description: How many link levels to follow from each start URL.

same_domain_only.title: Same domain only
same_domain_only.description: Only follow links on the same domain as the start URLs.

product_url_patterns.title: Product URL patterns
product_url_patterns.description: URL fragments that usually identify product pages.

include_patterns.title: Include URL patterns
include_patterns.description: Optional regex patterns URLs must match.

price_selectors.title: Price selectors
price_selectors.description: Optional CSS selectors for price text.

title_selectors.title: Title selectors
title_selectors.description: Optional CSS selectors for product title.

capture_screenshots.title: Capture screenshots
capture_screenshots.description: Save product page screenshots to the key-value store.

detect_changes.title: Detect changes
detect_changes.description: Compare price, availability, and content hash with the previous run.

snapshot_store_name.title: Snapshot store name
snapshot_store_name.description: Key-value store used to remember previous product state.

wait_ms.title: Wait after load
wait_ms.description: Extra wait before extracting product data.
